reset.title: Reset password · 1💗1
reset.heading: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Enter the email address you registered with and we'll send you a reset link
reset.successTitle: The email is on its way
reset.successBody: A password reset link was sent to your email. Can't see it? Check your spam folder too.
reset.error: We couldn't send the email. Please try again, and if it keeps happening write to us at baruch@1lev1.com

change.title: Create new password · 1💗1
change.heading: Create a new password
change.subtitle: Pick a strong password and rest easy
change.successBody: You can now log in with your new password
change.error: We couldn't update the password. The link may have expired — you can request a new one from the reset page.
